releaseNotes: Fixed Video page not showing videos on Vivo V40 Pro Android 16
Added in-screen video permission request and partial visual access handling
Video scanner now tries multiple MediaStore video collections safely
Added safer video query with MIME, size filtering and scan limit for Vivo/Honor devices
Fixed Thai Top 100 station tap playback
Thai Top 100 station tap now always starts local playback instead of auto-casting
Added Media3 HLS dependency for .m3u8 Online Radio streams
Normalized Thai Top 100 stream URLs before playback
